creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I see several issues:

1) PORTREVISION should be removed when PORTVERSION is increased.
2) Why is there a "clang" option
3) Why is clang being decided based on OSVERSION instead of the proper "USES=compiler:<feature>" method?
4) The post-install target is completely obsolete and should be removed, entirely


Also, portlint is nice but it's not equivalent to actually testing.
